message:
✨ Add "New namespace" option to GPU reservation dropdown (#876)

Keep the native <select> dropdown for namespace selection but add a
"+ New namespace..." option at the bottom. Selecting it reveals a
text input for typing a custom namespace name. An X button returns
to the dropdown list.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
